content: 💭「Processing」Salvador Bug with Train and Ultra Turn
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Salvador Bug with Train and Ultra Turn

content:
Dear keeper,  
Thank you for your valuable feedback. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience and dissatisfaction this issue may have caused. After thorough internal review, we confirm that this behavior is not a software defect but rather an intended outcome resulting from the cumulative activation of passive skills within the activity mechanism and associated task system.
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Salvador Bug with Train and Ultra Turn

content: 💭「Answered」Salvador Bug with Train and Ultra Turn
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Salvador Bug with Train and Ultra Turn

content: ✅「Answered」Salvador Bug with Train and Ultra Turn
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Salvador Bug with Train and Ultra Turn

content:
I'm not and expert, but considering that Salvador game plan is based on putting health in to the furnace and then using the furnace to heal or deal damage, contrary to how a normal healer work, the heal is cut 2 times, one time to transfer or add health from the card to the furnace and then the actual healing from consuming furnace is cut again, so you technically are penalized 2 times from it (maybe the ultra debuff can be comprehensible, but the general one is impossible to play around). 
So even if it is technically not bug, is still more detrimental than intended for him.
<@191643200950239232> What do you think? 
Salv may still work in the mode even with this double penalty or it kills his viability?
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Salvador Bug with Train and Ultra Turn

content: I mean, it's difficult for me to say since I have a higher investment in him that normal, but to hear that there's essentially been an undocumented nerf due to the ultra turn change isn't particularly great.
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Salvador Bug with Train and Ultra Turn

content: at least you can more or less play around that, i mostly talk about the general double cut for the mode
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Salvador Bug with Train and Ultra Turn

content: For the train mode my Salvador kinda feels unusable except maybe as a stat stick, the main mode of End of Suffering is actively harmful since it contributes less health than it gains.
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Salvador Bug with Train and Ultra Turn

content: nerfing him in other modes does not feel great either
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Salvador Bug with Train and Ultra Turn

content: Pretty much yeah - the main thing is it also impacts other aspects of him in ways that aren't normally affected - in particular it drastically cuts his shielding and damage ramp.
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Salvador Bug with Train and Ultra Turn

content: Since the double dip also means the main way you safely gain those things (ramping up and then healing back afterwards) is impacted heavily in the double dip - you ramp half as much, shield half as much, and then heal back half as much again.
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Salvador Bug with Train and Ultra Turn

content: the ultra turn nerf already makes my Salv worse at clearing difficult content (like a5 D-tide), I might have difficulty doing it reliably in the harder waves now since those were already on the edge for me, but the train mode issue straight up dumpsters him
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Salvador Bug with Train and Ultra Turn

content: Would you be able to explain why this works differently, then? And why the change was made for Ultra Turn? Sorry, i'm trying to understand why this is so different (especially since things like 24 and Xu's Exalt Furnace gain, as well as Salvador's Exalt Furnace gain, aren't affected by the healing reduction)
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Salvador Bug with Train and Ultra Turn

content: It's still not affecting things consistently.
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Salvador Bug with Train and Ultra Turn
